title: Scene with kaworu and SEELE
wikitext:
[]: Scene with kaworu and SEELE             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 09, 2004 1:48 pm There is something that i don't understand about that conversation: SEELE 01: But 'our' hopes are materializing... SEELE: In Lilith, progenitor of humanity - the false successors from the Black Moon... SEELE: And in Adam, progenitor of Angels - the true successors from the lost White Moon. Why SEELE says about humanity that we are " the FALSE successors from the Black Moon "?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 09, 2004 1:59 pm I guess they say that because the angels were suppose to inherit the earth after first impact, but instead humanity got it.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 09, 2004 2:40 pm Where was that from!? I'd remeber somthing like that....

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 09, 2004 2:44 pm It's from the directors cut dvd: Genesis Reborn.

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Fri Jul 09, 2004 2:52 pm It's from episode 24 of Genesis Reborn. In Jewish myth and lore, here is what that religion has to say about the Black and White Moon: "There are two Moons. The White Moon and the Black Moon. In the two Moons are represented the universal, feminine forces of sexuality. Creation comes to be from the evolving processes of sound. Sound is the expression of sexuality. The Angels create with the sexual power of the creative larynx. The primordial unmanifested sound, through its incessant evolving processes, comes to be converted into energetic forms of stabilized, dense matter. The unmanifested, primordial sound is the Subtle Voice. The primordial sound contains in itself the masculine-feminine sexual forces. These forces are multiplied and complicated in conformity with our descent into the difficult abyss of matter. The positive pole of sound is the miraculous force, which attracts us towards the Unmanifested Absolute, where only happiness reigns. The negative pole of sound is the dark force, which attracts us to this valley of bitterness. The positive pole is solar, Christie, divine. The negative pole is lunar and is represented by the Moon. The Shadow of the White Moon is Lilith. The origin of fornication is in Lilith. The origin of the "I" is the Black Moon. The Black Moon is Lilith.JEHOVA works with the White Moon. CHAVAJOTH works with the Black Moon. The creation of the phenomenal universe is impossible without the intervention of the Lunar Forces; unfortunately, the dark forces of the Black Moon intervene and harm the creation. The sun and the moon represent the positive and the negative poles of sound. The sun and the moon originate the Creation. The sun is positive and the moon negative. The sun is the husband and the moon the wife; the devil Lilith gets in between and harms the Great Work. As above, so below. Man is the sun and woman the moon. Lilith is the Satan that seduces them both and leads them to fornication and to the Abyss. Lilith is the Black Moon, the dark aspect of the White Moon: the origin of the "I" and of separate individuality." There is also a black and white moon in Sailor Moon: "The Black Moon are traitors from Earth who rejected the power of the Moon Kingdom. They thought that the infinite power of the ginzuishou and its ability to give people eternal youth went against God's will, so they rebelled. Wiseman appeared and told them that if they went to Nemesis, they could have unlimited power. Nemesis was the tenth planet in the solar system and was where criminals were sent to live instead of being killed. There, the Black Moon family learned of the evil black crystal and began using it, but Nemesis was destroyed; they then decided to use the crystal to return to Earth but to go into the past to rewrite the future. The Black Moon wants to take over the other planets, primarily Earth; they are extremely cruel in their methods, even using poison gas on the people of Crystal Tokyo." Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:43 am i think they said that the black moon was the source of all human life (room of gauf type thing) and that it was lilith's egg...
